name: 4" x 3"LED Flameless Black Wick Candle Cream - Threshold™
description:
Set the perfect mood for romantic date night or refreshing yourself after a long day by lighting up this 4" x 3" LED Flameless Black Wick Candle from Threshold™. This flameless candle looks like a pillar candle, with an LED bulb inside. With a realistic black wick, this cream candle will add a warm and inviting touch to your decor. Pair with candles of different heights and mix it in with other decorative elements for a cohesive look.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
